creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, 2009-07-03 at 12:07 +0200, Tobias Rehbein wrote:
> Hi all. 
> 
> I hope it's okay to cc bugmeister@ but it seems this PR is completely
> messed up. At least looking at
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/135929 I have the
> impression that all content included in this PR has been lost. It's
> fine if you just close the PR so I can simply open a new one, but I
> want to write down what happened to this PR in case I hit a bug in
> GNATS.

I'm not actually sure what has happened here to be honest.  It does
appear that the patch that was originally supplied with the PR has gone
missing.

> How do we proceed with this PR? As noted it's ok to close it and let
> me submit another one.

To be honest, it's probably easiest if I close this PR and you open two
new ones, one for the update to www/nanoblogger, and a separate one for
the new port www/nanoblogger-extra.

Meanwhile, I'll see if I can get to the bottom of what happened, however
I'm not confident I'll be able to figure it out.

Thanks,

Gavin
